group.name: Knowledge DB Skills
group.description: Skills for consuming and maintaining kb-core@2 local Markdown knowledge bases with schema-aware search, provenance tracing, and validation.
capabilities: Search and read local Markdown knowledge bases with schema-aware filters
Trace knowledge provenance from knowledge to info to source
Create canonical info and knowledge entries, then maintain and validate kb-core@2 packages

skills.name: Knowledge DB Use
skills.description: Consume a kb-core@2 local Markdown knowledge base by discovering package metadata, searching with weighted generic fields, reading entries, and tracing provenance without modifying files.

skills.name: Knowledge DB Maintain
skills.description: Create and maintain a kb-core@2 local Markdown knowledge base with canonical entry templates, package-defined metadata, self-contained validation, generic filters, provenance tracing, and metadata-aware search.

skills.name: Knowledge DB Organize
skills.description: Reorganize a local Markdown knowledge base into a normalized hierarchy while preserving provenance, links, and semantic metadata.
